places.name: Wenhua Road Night Market
places.note: Chiayi's main night market, good spot to try the city's signature turkey rice

places.name: Hinoki Village
places.note: Cluster of beautifully preserved Japanese-era cypress worker dormitories turned cultural park

places.name: Chiayi Park
places.note: Central city park with ponds, pavilions, and a Japanese Shinto shrine remnant

places.name: Sun-Shooting Tower
places.note: Pagoda tower in Chiayi Park with views over the city

places.name: Former Chiayi Prison
places.note: Japanese colonial prison with rare fan-shaped cell block architecture, now a heritage site

places.name: Alishan Forest Railway Chiayi Station
places.note: Historic departure point for the scenic narrow-gauge railway up to Alishan
